name: Santina 60" Floor Lamp - FLL7007 - Gold/White Marble - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Santina 60 inch floor lamp�a stunning blend of gold and white marble that adds elegance to any room. This beautiful lamp features a sleek metal structure that complements its sophisticated design. The gold finish paired with the exquisite white marble base creates a perfect harmony of style and functionality. Whether placed in a living room or office, the Santina floor lamp offers a brilliant accent that enhances your decor with a touch of modern flair. Its captivating presence makes it a standout piece, effortlessly bringing warmth and illumination to your space. Transform your ambience and enjoy the radiant glow of the Santina floor lamp today.
